name: Ricercar
description: Contrapuntal visual-music painting (Ricercar.2 — substrate spike). A flowing colour FIELD: Skein's canvas-hold mv_warp reconfigured to a divergence-free curl-noise FLOW warp + slow decay-toward-light-ground, so deposited colour drifts, merges wet-into-wet, and breathes back to light at rest (silence-non-black by construction). Colour is hand-fed here (three drifting LOW/MID/HIGH lane masses); the Filigree-class agent 'voices', audio routing, and per-track seed arrive at Ricercar.3.x/.3/.4. See docs/presets/RICERCAR_DESIGN.md.
author: Matt
